title: Affecting functions of a vehicle based on function-related information about its environment
abstract: Among other things, information is received that identifies or defines a function-related feature of an environment of a vehicle. Function-related information is generated that corresponds to the function-related feature.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A method comprising receiving information that identifies or defines a function-related feature of an environment of a vehicle, and generating function-related information that corresponds to the function-related feature. 2. The method of claim 1 in which the information is received from an automated process. 3. The method of claim 1 in which the information is received from a user interacting with a user interface. 4. The method of claim 1 in which the information is received from a combination of an automated process and a user interacting with a user interface. 5. The method of claim 1 in which the function-related information comprises a location that corresponds to the function-related feature. 6. The method of claim 1 in which the function-related feature comprises a geographic region that corresponds to the function-related feature. 7. The method of claim 1 in which the function-related feature comprises a road feature. 8. The method of claim 1 in which the information is received while the vehicle is traveling in the vicinity of the function-related feature. 9. The method of claim 1 comprising storing the generated function-related information in a database. 10. The method of claim 1 in which the database comprises a road network information database that includes information about road segments. 11. The method of claim 1 comprising feeding the function-related information through a communication network to a location where road network information is accumulated. 12. A method comprising based on information received about a function-related feature of an environment of a vehicle that has been identified in connection with a location of the vehicle, affecting execution of a function of a vehicle to alter performance characteristics of the function based on the identified function-related feature. 13. The method of claim 12 in which the function-related feature comprises a geographic region. 14. The method of claim 12 in which the function-related feature comprises a road feature. 15. The method of claim 12 in which the function comprises a software process. 16. The method of claim 12 in which the function comprises motion planning. 17. The method of claim 12 in which the function comprises trajectory tracking. 18. The method of claim 12 in which the function comprises actuator control. 19. The method of claim 12 in which the function comprises decision-making. 20. The method of claim 12 in which the function comprises perception processing. 21. The method of claim 12 in which the function comprises localization of the vehicle. 22. The method of claim 12 in which the function comprises sensor data recording on-board the vehicle. 23. The method of claim 12 in which the execution of the function is affected by switching from one function to another function. 24. The method of claim 12 in which the execution of the function is affected by altering an operation of a function. 25. The method of claim 12 in which the affecting of the execution of the function is based on parameter settings. 26. The method of claim 25 in which the parameter settings are selected from among two or more different sets of parameter settings. 27. The method of claim 25 in which the affecting of the execution of the function is based on prior information. 28. The method of claim 27 in which the prior information comprises a simulation model. 29. The method of claim 27 in which the prior information includes two or more simulation models. 30. The method of claim 12 comprising receiving the information about the function-related feature from a database.
